hypothesis: If a graph neural network integrates frozen pre-trained single-gas etch models as node feature extractors with gas-fraction inputs, then it will predict Ar/O2 mixture radial etching rates more accurately and generalize to unseen power/pressure and composition regimes (Testgrid and Testthresh) than equivalently sized FNNs or standard GNNs trained on the same data because transferable single-gas representations encode physics that improves mixture generalization.
